sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMPTZ);
SELECT id, epoch_ns(event_time) AS nanoseconds FROM test_timestamps;
UPDATE test_timestamps SET event_time = '2023-01-01 00:00:00+00'::TIMESTAMPTZ WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, epoch_ns(event_time) AS nanoseconds FROM test_timestamps WHERE id = 1;
